JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION h ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = h.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC s ON h.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = s.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID
WHERE g.STATE ILIKE 'Rajasthan'
AND s.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = 15
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g2
    JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION h2 ON g2.GEOGRAPHY_ID = h2.GEOGRAPHY_ID
    JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC s2 ON h2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = s2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID
    WHERE g2.DISTRICT = g.DISTRICT
    AND s2.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = 15
    AND s2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY ILIKE 'Dalit'
);

predicted_sql: SELECT fpd.PERSON_GENDER, AVG(fpe.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) AS avg_education_years, COUNT(*) AS total_persons FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS fpd INNER JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION fpe ON fpd.PERSON_ID = fpe.PERSON_ID WHERE fpd.WORKED_ANY_JOB_INDICATOR = 1 GROUP BY fpd.PERSON_GENDER ORDER BY avg_education_years DESC;
